use_cases: User profile creation allowing selection from predefined avatar options
Account setup flow where users pick their profile picture
Onboarding wizard for user identity customization
Settings panel for changing user avatar representation
Team or group member avatar assignment interface
ai_summary: A prebuilt avatar picker component featuring a grid of colorful SVG avatars with smooth hover and click animations. Built with motion/react for fluid transitions and wrapped in a Card component, it provides an elegant selection interface for profile picture customization in any application requiring user identity representation.
